title: Record a web research readiness contract
prompt: Create reports/web-research-contract.md with sections for Current-time year, Context7 library docs, WebSearch primary sources, and FetchURL citation.

fixtureActions.content:
# Web Research Contract

## Current-time year
prefer GetCurrentTime / <current_time> before year-sensitive claims

## Context7 library docs
Context7Resolve → Context7Docs for library APIs (built-in, no MCP); resolve caps at 8 matches and docs text at 12k chars

## WebSearch primary sources
WebSearch defaults to 3 hits then FetchURL for CVEs, releases, papers; prefer a sharper query over raising limit; include_content capped at 8k/page

## FetchURL citation
cite primary source URLs; do not rely only on snippets
